cells: To report what someone else said
_My dad said that he'**d written** a song._

**present simple**
_'I **want** to build a new house,' said Jill._

**past simple**
_Jill said she **wanted** to build a new house._
cells_ru:
**present simple**
_'Я **хочу** построить новый дом,' сказала Джилл._

**past simple**
_Джилл сказала, что **хочет** построить новый дом._

cells:
**present continuous**
_'We **are making** a dress,' they said._

**past continuous**
_They said they **were making** a dress._

**present perfect continuous**
_'I **have been drawing** all day,' said Debbie._

**past perfect continuous**
_Debbie said she **had been drawing** all day._
cells_uz:
**present perfect continuous**
_'Men butun kun rasm **chizib keldim**,' dedi Debbie._

**past perfect continuous**
_Debbie butun kun rasm **chizib kelganini** aytdi._
cells_ru:
**present perfect continuous**
_'Я **рисую** весь день,' сказала Дебби._

**past perfect continuous**
_Дебби сказала, что **рисовала** весь день._

cells:
**past simple**
_'Jim **made** a card for me yesterday,' Amy said._

**past perfect simple**
_Amy said Jim **had made** a card for her the day before._
cells_uz:
**past simple**
_'Jim kecha menga otkritka **yasadi**,' dedi Amy._

**past perfect simple**
_Amy Jimning bir kun oldin unga otkritka **yasaganini** aytdi._
cells_ru:
**past simple**
_'Джим **сделал** мне открытку вчера,' сказала Эми._

**past perfect simple**
_Эми сказала, что Джим **сделал** ей открытку накануне._

cells:
**past continuous**
_'I **was writing** a poem,' said Tina._

**past perfect continuous**
_Tina said she **had been writing** a poem._

**will**
_'I **will** make you a scarf,' my grandma said._

**would**
_My grandma said she **would** make me a scarf._
cells_uz:
**will**
_'Men seni uchun ro'mol **to'qib beraman**,' dedi buvim._

cells:
**am/is/are going to**
_'They **are going to** make a new one,' said Joe._

**was/were going to**
_Joe said they **were going to** make a new one._
cells_uz:
**am/is/are going to**
_'Ular yangi birini **yasashmoqchi**,' dedi Joe._

**was/were going to**
_Joe ularning yangi birini **yasashmoqchiligini** aytdi._
cells_ru:
**am/is/are going to**
_'Они **собираются** сделать новый,' сказал Джо._

**was/were going to**
_Джо сказал, что они **собирались** сделать новый._

cells:
**can**
_'I **can** draw quite well,' Emma said._

**could**
_Emma said she **could** draw quite well._
cells_uz:
**can**
_'Men juda yaxshi rasm **chiza olaman**,' dedi Emma._

cells:
**must / have to**
_'You **have to** visit the fashion show,' she said._

**had to**
_She said we **had to** visit the fashion show._
cells_uz:
**must / have to**
_'Siz moda ko'rgazmasiga **borishingiz kerak**,' dedi u._

**had to**
_U biz moda ko'rgazmasiga **borishimiz kerakligini** aytdi._
cells_ru:
**must / have to**
_'Вы **должны** посетить показ мод,' сказала она._

**had to**
_Она сказала, что мы **должны** посетить показ мод._

cells:
**may**
_'I **may** visit the White House next week,' said Polly._

**might**
_Polly said she **might** visit the White House the following week._
cells_uz:
**may**
_'Men keyingi hafta Oq uyga **tashrif buyurishim mumkin**,' dedi Polly._

**might**
_Polly keyingi hafta Oq uyga **tashrif buyurishi mumkinligini** aytdi._
cells_ru:
**may**
_'На следующей неделе я, **возможно, посещу** Белый дом,' сказала Полли._

**might**
_Полли сказала, что на следующей неделе **может** посетить Белый дом._

cells: I → he/she
we → they
you → I/me/they/them
us → them
my → his/her
your → my/their

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation:
Biz ko'pincha fe'l shaklidan tashqari boshqa so'zlarni ham o'zgartiramiz.

Olmoshlar:
• I → he/she
• you → I/me/they/them
• we → they
• us → them
• my → his/her
• your → my/their

Vaqt va joy:
• here → there
• now → then/at that moment
• tomorrow → the next day
• tonight → that night
• next week → the following week
• yesterday → the day before
• last week → the week before
• ago → before
tip.translation_ru:
Мы часто меняем и другие слова, помимо формы глагола.

Местоимения:
• I → he/she
• you → I/me/they/them
• we → they
• us → them
• my → his/her
• your → my/their

Время и место:
• here → there
• now → then/at that moment
• tomorrow → the next day
• tonight → that night
• next week → the following week
• yesterday → the day before
• last week → the week before
• ago → before

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Xabar qiluvchi fe'l (say, va boshqalar) hozirgi zamonda bo'lsa, zamon o'zgarmaydi.
✓ _Tony **says** he **is going** to study architecture._
✗ _Tony says he was going to study architecture._

• Biz past perfect simple va past perfect continuous shakllarini o'zgartirmaymiz.
✓ _'I **had seen** the picture before.' → He said he **had seen** the picture before._

• Biz _would, should, could_ va _might_ shakllarini ham o'zgartirmaymiz.
✓ _'I **might** take up painting.' → She said she **might** take up painting._

• Biz reported speech da _apologise, deny, promise, refuse_ va _suggest_ kabi fe'llarni ishlatishimiz mumkin.
✓ _Jan **apologised for losing** the picture._
✓ _Charlotte **refused to** let me see her painting._
✓ _He **denied breaking** the statue._
✓ _My dad **suggested going** to an art gallery._
✓ _Terence **promised to** help me decorate the house._
tip.translation_ru:
• Если глагол, вводящий reported speech (say и т. д.), стоит в настоящем времени, мы не меняем время.
✓ _Tony **says** he **is going** to study architecture._
✗ _Tony says he was going to study architecture._

• Мы не меняем past perfect simple и past perfect continuous.
✓ _'I **had seen** the picture before.' → He said he **had seen** the picture before._

• Мы также не меняем _would, should, could_ и _might_.
✓ _'I **might** take up painting.' → She said she **might** take up painting._

• Мы можем использовать в reported speech глаголы _apologise, deny, promise, refuse_ и _suggest_.
✓ _Jan **apologised for losing** the picture._
✓ _Charlotte **refused to** let me see her painting._
✓ _He **denied breaking** the statue._
✓ _My dad **suggested going** to an art gallery._
✓ _Terence **promised to** help me decorate the house._
